name: Restaurant RPG
description:
Restaurant RPG!

A new immersive idea made by me!

Become a chef of any restaurant of your choosing! Doesn’t matter what food you make, all that matters is that your customers are happy.

UPDATE 1.0

 Yelp: People can give you ratings based on your food presentation, your restaurants atmosphere, and your staff’s behavior!

Staff: Hire staff for your restaurant! It’ll save you in the long run, believe me on this.

Character Interactions: Interact with different customers inside your restaurant! Ask them various questions, and spark up conversation with different people.
creator: trev101
